description_long: This object is a classic electric bass guitar set up with a full performance rig, including an amplifier stack, effects pedals, and a guitar stand. The guitar features a sunburst finish with a contoured double-cutaway body, a bolt-on neck, and a headstock with four tuning pegs arranged in a line. The amplifier stack consists of a large speaker cabinet and a separate amplifier head, both with metal corner protectors and visible control panels. Two effects pedals are connected by patch cables, and a coiled instrument cable links the guitar to the amp. The setup is typical for live street performances or band rehearsals in urban environments, with all components placed on a flat surface.
description: A sunburst electric bass guitar with a full amplifier stack, effects pedals, and cables, arranged as a performance setup.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the amplifier head, speaker cabinet, and the guitar on its stand with cables coiled on the ground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the amplifier stack, the guitar's body profile, and the effects pedals on the ground.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the amplifier's speaker grille, the guitar's sunburst finish, and the pedal arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear side view showing the back of the guitar, amplifier handles, and cable connections.
attribute_headstock_design: Elongated headstock with four inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, standard bass shape
